case_title: HOLVORSEN, KUM-JA VS CHAE, DONG SHU DBA DSC CONST. & ROOF. CO et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,500.00 FILED BY HOLVORSEN, KUM-JA AS TO DEFENDANT CHAE, DONG SHU DBA DSC CONST. & ROOF. CO AKA DSC CONSTRUCTION CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-16-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PLAINTIFF SIGNED A DECLARATION DEFENDANT NOT SERVED.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-12-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-18-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 POSSIBLE SETTLEMENT BETWEEN THE PARTIES. CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT ON REPAIRS.
TRIAL RESET TO JUN-09-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAY-16-2005 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-09-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-12-2005 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 POSSIBLE SETTLEMENT BETWEEN THE PARTIES. FOR FURTHER TRIAL.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-18-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-03-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED FOR A TRIAL PROGRESS REPORT ON 3/3/06 AT 01:30 PM FOR FINAL PROGRESS REPORT & SEE IF REPAIR RESOLVED THE LEAKING ROOF.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOLVORSEN, KUM-JA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHAE, DONG SHU DBA DSC CONST. & ROOF. CO AKA DSC CONSTRUCTION CO. $4,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,560.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COURT FILE ON DIANNE'S DESK-AWAITING JUDGEMENT FORM FROM JUDGE OLLIE MARIE-VICTOIRE.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CHAE, DONG SHU DBA DSC CONST. & ROOF. CO AKA DSC CONSTRUCTION CO.
PLAINTIFF SIGNED A DECLARATION TO CHANGE THE DEFENDANT'S ADDRESS.
